programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Stagecoach to Denver
programme.desc: Lambert has the stagecoach wrecked killing the Commissioner so his phony replacement can alter Coonskins land survey When Red Ryder exposes the survey hoax Lambert has his stooge Sheriff put Red in jail

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: License to Drive
programme.desc: A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite flunking his drivers test

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to find the location of MADs school for agents

programme.title: Grape 122

programme.desc: Herculoids

programme.title: Bullwinkle 103
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 103

programme.title: Bullwinkle 104
programme.desc: Bullwinkle 104

programme.title: Dogfight - The Mystery of the Red Baron
programme.desc: The corpse-lined trenches of Northern France are well known as one of the deadliest killing grounds of World War I In fact proportionatly an even more lethal war was taking place in the skies over Europe The worlds first flying aces were regarded as the cosseted glamour boys of The Great War But by 1917 the life expectancy of a new pilot was just two weeks

programme.title: The Forgotten Gunners Of WWI
programme.desc: The team explores the grounds around Belton House near Grantham which were home to thousands of men training for frontline duties in WWI

programme.title: Hell in the Pacific Pt4
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific was not just between Japan and America; it was also Britains forgotten war and one of the dirtiest conflicts in living memory Hell in the Pacific is a revisionist examination of that conflict tracing the use of horrific torture and propaganda not only by the Japanese but controversially by the Americans and the Allies as well Included are are previously unheard eye-witness accounts and stories of American troops collecting noses ears and skulls as trophies

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: When Nick Knight goes to investigate the alleged suicide of a space scientist he discovers that an asteroid is heading for Earth and is projected to strike within 3 months

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A record store clerk with psychotic tendencies is granted unspeakable powers by a magical pendant which he abuses to fulfill his dream of meeting a beautiful rock star

programme.title: The Stuff
programme.desc: A delicious mysterious goo that oozes from the earth is marketed as the newest dessert sensation but the tasty treat rots more than teeth when zombie-like snackers who only want to consume more of the strange substance at any cost begin infesting the world

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A washed up newspaper editor is given the story of a lifetime However he soon finds out that the newspaper tells the future and sees an article about him committing suicide

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married Todd Fields teaches a high school photography class in a small quiet country town but aspires to work in a big city and gets led astray when he falls under the seductive spell of attractive new student Roseanne Lucas

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS has developed another robot that goes up against Hymie

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When Bear becomes ill BJ takes him to a vet and is subsequently told that he has died However it turns out that the vet is secretly selling animals to a laboratory and Bear is still alive

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: When Binghamton refuses permission for McHale and The Crew to put on a big show to raise funds for the local Orphanage Parker uses his newly-acquired skill as a Hypnotist to make The Captain more agreeable But the scheme is complicated by the visit of a Senator from the Armed Services Committee

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker - A dead-ringer for an important British General - Agrees to put his life on the line by posing as The General to divert the attention of spies in New Caledonia while the real General carries out a crucial invasion of a Japanese-held island

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer volunteers to train a German Shepherd named Killer intended for sentry duty but turns Killer into a pussycat

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways are scared that a group of gangsters are on the island but it turns out just to be a parrot who also squawks wildly when he hears the words boat and jewel

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan is forced to become the Howells house-boy when the Skipper loses a bet to Mr Howell in a turtle actually a tortoise race

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa thinks hes the life-of-the-party

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to stop a marriage-minded widow from chasing George

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 are looking for the man that is sabotaging missile launches

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The Love Boat

programme.title: WKRP 224
programme.desc: WKRP 224

programme.title: WKRP 121
programme.desc: WKRP 121

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Ponder hopes that an old flames visit may become permanent; Will must deal with a bully at school

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Part 2 of 2 Tanna after a series of rigorous torture sessions involving hypnosis and high-frequency noise intended to program him into killing Roth manages to trick Remick and his henchmen into thinking that their efforts were successful Unknown to them Tanna has used a candle to make earplugs and a splinter in his mouth to block pain impulses used in the sessions Giving him a rifle loaded with wax bullets Tanna aims and fires at what hes led to believe is Roth but is simply another test as the floating body turns out to be that of a double and is alive and well Shortly after this federal agents arrive and question Tanna who learns that he and The Commission have been under surveillance all along and that Roth has been in protective custody and not in any danger Though initially enraged at the thought of agents sitting idly by while he was tortured Tanna agrees to help in their investigation to bring Remick and his men to justice

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jennifer is kidnapped by a man who wants to get some of the money from an old crime by holding his ex-partners wife who happens to be a dead ringer for Jennifer

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Michael is lost when Stephanie goes away for the weekend He goes to a Beaver Lodge dinner with George and is the life of the party

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Neeg is killed by a bacteria that is deadly to both Taelons and Humans If it spreads it might be disastrous A new racist group attacks a community center

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Blackwood Project investigates individuals who claim to have had close encounters The team stumbles onto an alien plot involving implanting something into victims bodies for the study of the human immune system setting them free and collecting them later to learn the results Harrison ends up dating one of the victims Karen McKinney

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Rowan who claims that she and Will were married in a previous life before she was burned as a witch finds herself accused of murder Can she find her true self before the angry mob takes the law into their own hands

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When one of Dr Arcanes experiments is inexplicably ruined Graham suspects poltergeists Arcane swiftly discovers the spirit of General Sunderland is haunting the swamp and has plans for revenge

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: With Maya now a crew member the Alphans discover a young couple called Cantor and Zova who have been in suspended animation for some while They claim that they are exiles from the planet Golos following an invasion and ask for the help of Alphan crew members to recover the rest of their comrades who are trapped in missile-like canisters in orbit around the moon Helena and Tony convince Koenig that the alien couple are innocent beings and allow them the chance to recover their people However Cantor and Zova abduct Helena and Tony transporting them to the planet Golos where it is apparent that they are not the young innocents they appeared to be

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.desc: While wagon master of a train Cheyenne trades for a Comanche prisoner of the Apaches because he notices the boy is white Cheyenne hopes to convince him to stay with them rather than return to the Comanche but prejudice may stop him

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Godzilla Vs The Sea Monster
programme.desc: James Rolfe reviews the 1966 film Ebirah Horror of the Deep dubbed Godzilla vs the Sea Monster by him directed by Jun Fukuda It features a film in which Godzilla was added as a late addition He then battles a giant crab

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Colton Cronkite v. Todd Vatcher

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever
